Name: Onboarding checklist redesign
Hypothesis: Replacing the 8-step onboarding with a 4-step guided flow will increase Day 7 activation from 34% to 45%
Learnings: Users were dropping off at step 5 (invite teammates). Moving it to post-activation removed the blocker. The 4-step flow also reduced median onboarding time from 12 min to 6 min.
Next Steps: Roll out to 100% of new signups. Test moving team invite to an in-app prompt after first value moment.

Name: Usage-based trial extension
Hypothesis: Offering a 7-day trial extension to users who hit 80% of activation milestones will increase trial-to-paid conversion from 12% to 18%
Learnings: Extension users converted at 31% vs 12% baseline. Key insight: they needed more time to get stakeholder buy-in not more time to evaluate the product.
Next Steps: Ship to all users hitting 80% activation. Test adding a 'share with your manager' CTA during the extension offer.

Name: In-app NPS at Day 30
Hypothesis: Triggering an in-app NPS survey at Day 30 instead of email will increase response rates from 8% to 25% and give us faster signal on churn risk
Learnings: Response rate 4x'd. Detractors (score 0-6) churned at 3x the rate of promoters within 60 days confirming NPS as a leading churn indicator for our segment.
Next Steps: Replace email NPS entirely. Pipe detractor responses to CS team Slack channel for immediate follow-up within 24 hours.

Name: LinkedIn retargeting for trial signups
Hypothesis: Retargeting website visitors on LinkedIn with customer testimonial ads will reduce CAC from $520 to $400 for mid-market leads
Learnings: Early results promising — CPL down 27% after 2 weeks but sample size still small (n=89). Need 200+ to reach significance.
Next Steps: Continue running through March. If results hold prepare to shift 30% of paid budget from Google to LinkedIn.

Name: Slack-first onboarding for teams
Hypothesis: Delivering onboarding tips via a shared Slack channel instead of email will increase team activation (3+ users active) from 22% to 35%
Next Steps: Need to build Slack bot and onboarding content sequence. Engineering estimate: 2 weeks. Biggest risk is whether admins will approve adding a bot to their workspace.
column16: Spec out Slack bot requirements. Survey 10 current customers on willingness to install. If >60% say yes proceed with build.
